SCP-TEST waited at the end of the abandoned platform, silent except for the tiny grit that slid from its shoulders. Investigators logged each blink in pairs, yet every relay review found the figure closer than before. 관측 기록은 일치하지 않았고, each witness described the same impossible sensation: the platform felt shorter every time they looked away. By the time the emergency shutters sealed, a second trail of dust already marked the path behind them.
